name: glassmorphism-light
description: 轻盈毛玻璃拟态风格 - 明亮渐变托底、半透明磨砂卡片、细亮边框、轻空气感层级

typography.headers: Inter / SF Pro Display / Helvetica Neue
typography.body: Inter / SF Pro Text / Noto Sans

prompt_template: Light glassmorphism PPT slide, bright airy frosted glass aesthetic, soft white background with blurred gradient shapes {background}, translucent rounded cards, thin luminous white borders, subtle drop shadows, layered floating panels, accent colors {palette}, clean modern sans-serif typography, premium product presentation, spacious composition, --ar {aspect_ratio} --style raw --v 6
negative_prompt: dark cyberpunk, grunge, heavy texture, thick black outlines, brutalist blocks, muddy colors, realistic people, cluttered layout, harsh shadows, opaque cards, low contrast text
